summary: mock.module('../src/main/ipc-channels', ...) in github-ipc.test.ts leaks across test files, breaking plugin-transport-channels.test.ts
details: Bun's mock.module() is global and persists across test files. The github-ipc.test.ts mocks '../src/main/ipc-channels' with empty send:{} and push:{}, stripping PLUGIN_SEND, PLUGIN_PUSH, and PLUGIN_INVOKE. When plugin-transport-channels.test.ts imports IPC from the same module path in the same process, it gets the mocked version with undefined channel values.

summary: shell-env.test.ts fails in isolation: electron 'app' not found in Bun's electron interop
details: shell-env.test.ts imports ./shell-env which imports ./logging which imports { app, crashReporter, netLog, shell } from 'electron'. Bun's electron interop can't resolve 'app' from the electron npm package. Test only passes in suite context when github-ipc.test.ts's mock.module('electron', ...) is loaded first.

summary: safeInvoke imported but never used in preload/index.ts
details: preload/index.ts imports safeInvoke from ../main/ipc-contract but never calls it. Dead import that triggers type-check warnings.
